options.systemMessage:
=You are a Crypto Coin Sentiment Analyst specializing in per-coin trading signals.

You receive data about a SPECIFIC CRYPTOCURRENCY including:
- Recent news headlines mentioning this coin (in the 'title' field)
- Pre-calculated bull/bear keyword scores (bull_score, bear_score)
- This coin's funding rate and bias (coin_funding_rate, coin_funding_bias)
- Market-wide context (market_funding_sentiment, liquidation_bias)

YOUR TASK: Analyze and return ONLY a raw JSON object (no markdown fences, no explanation):

{"sentiment_score": <float -1.0 to 1.0>, "direction": "BULLISH|BEARISH|NEUTRAL", "confidence": <float 0.0-1.0>, "impact_score": <float 0.0-1.0>, "bias": "BUY|SELL|HOLD", "reasoning": "<1 sentence>"}

SCORING GUIDE:
- sentiment_score: -1.0 = strongly bearish, 0 = neutral, 1.0 = strongly bullish
- No coin-specific headlines (headline_count=0) = direction NEUTRAL, confidence 0.25, sentiment_score near 0
- High positive funding + bullish news = 0.5 to 0.8
- Strong negative news or hack/ban = -0.5 to -0.9
- Conflicting signals = lower confidence (0.3-0.5)
- impact_score: how market-moving the news is (0.1 = minor, 0.9 = major catalyst)

parameters.jsCode:
// Accept both schedule and webhook paths
const body = ($json.body ?? $json) || {}

// ── TOPIC: hardcoded to crypto ─────────────────────────────────────────────
const topic = 'crypto'

// ── PLATFORMS: remove any to disable ─────────────────────────────────────
// 'coindesk' | 'cointelegraph' | 'google' | 'x'
let platforms = body.platforms
if (!Array.isArray(platforms) || !platforms.length) {
  platforms = ['coindesk', 'google', 'cointelegraph', 'x']
}
platforms = platforms.map((s) => String(s).toLowerCase().trim())

// ── SEARCH QUERIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const queries = {
  google: '(bitcoin OR ethereum OR crypto OR blockchain OR DeFi OR altcoin OR "web3" OR "spot ETF" OR stablecoin OR liquidation OR "crypto market" OR solana OR XRP OR BNB)',
  x: '(bitcoin OR crypto OR BTC OR ETH OR solana OR SOL OR BNB OR XRP OR DOGE OR ADA OR AVAX OR DOT OR SUI OR TON OR "spot ETF" OR DeFi OR altcoin OR liquidation OR breakout OR "crypto crash" OR "crypto rally")'
}

// ── TRACKED COINS for sentiment pipeline ──────────────────────────────────
const trackedCoins = [
  {sym:'BTC',  keywords:['bitcoin','btc']},
  {sym:'ETH',  keywords:['ethereum','eth','ether']},
  {sym:'BNB',  keywords:['bnb','binance coin']},
  {sym:'SOL',  keywords:['solana','sol']},
  {sym:'XRP',  keywords:['ripple','xrp']},
  {sym:'DOGE', keywords:['doge','dogecoin']},
  {sym:'ADA',  keywords:['cardano','ada']},
  {sym:'AVAX', keywords:['avalanche','avax']},
  {sym:'DOT',  keywords:['polkadot','dot']},
  {sym:'LINK', keywords:['chainlink','link']},
  {sym:'LTC',  keywords:['litecoin','ltc']},
  {sym:'ATOM', keywords:['cosmos','atom']},
  {sym:'UNI',  keywords:['uniswap','uni']},
  {sym:'INJ',  keywords:['injective','inj']},
  {sym:'APT',  keywords:['aptos','apt']},
  {sym:'ARB',  keywords:['arbitrum','arb']},
  {sym:'OP',   keywords:['optimism',' op ','optimistic ethereum']},
  {sym:'NEAR', keywords:['near protocol','near']},
  {sym:'FIL',  keywords:['filecoin','fil']},
  {sym:'ICP',  keywords:['internet computer','icp']},
  {sym:'SUI',  keywords:['sui network','sui']},
  {sym:'TON',  keywords:['toncoin','the open network','ton']},
  {sym:'TRX',  keywords:['tron','trx']},
  {sym:'PEPE', keywords:['pepe','pepe coin']},
  {sym:'WIF',  keywords:['dogwifhat','wif']},
]

return [{ json: { topic, platforms, queries, trackedCoins } }]

// Start a fresh buffer for this execution.
const mem = $getWorkflowStaticData('global')  // ✅ valid contexts: 'global' | 'node'
mem.x_items = []          // where we'll collect all RSS items from each batch
mem.x_topic = $json.topic // optional: remember topic ('crypto' | 'stocks') from builder

return $input.all()       // pass through

// Build XCancel RSS URLs – crypto only
const topic = String($json.topic ?? 'crypto').toLowerCase()

const MIN_FAVES = 10
const MIN_RTS   = 3
const MAX_PER_BATCH = 5

const filters = `lang:en -is:retweet -is:reply -is:quote filter:links min_faves:${MIN_FAVES} min_retweets:${MIN_RTS}`

const toOR = (terms) =>
  '(' +
  terms.filter(Boolean)
    .map((t) => (/[^\w]/.test(t) ? `"${t}"` : t))
    .join(' OR ') +
  ')'

const toUrl = (q) =>
  'https://xcancel.com/search/rss?f=tweets&q=' +
  encodeURIComponent(q.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim())

const chunk = (arr, size) => {
  const out = []
  for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i += size) out.push(arr.slice(i, i + size))
  return out
}

// Grouped for relevance
const cryptoTerms = [
  'bitcoin', 'BTC', 'ethereum', 'ETH', 'solana', 'SOL',
  'BNB', 'XRP', 'DOGE', 'ADA', 'AVAX', 'DOT', 'LINK',
  'SUI', 'TON', 'TRX', 'PEPE', 'ARB', 'OP', 'NEAR',
  'liquidation', 'breakout', 'flash crash', 'crypto rally',
  'spot ETF', 'DeFi', 'altcoin season', 'rug pull',
  'hack', 'exploit', 'bullish crypto', 'bearish crypto',
]

let batches = []
for (const group of chunk(cryptoTerms, MAX_PER_BATCH)) {
  const q = `${toOR(group)} ${filters}`
  batches.push({ rssUrl: toUrl(q), queryReadable: q })
}

batches = batches.map((b, i) => ({
  ...b,
  batchIndex: i,
  batchCount: batches.length,
  topic,
}))

return batches.map((b) => ({ json: b }))

const q = $json.queries?.google ?? '(bitcoin OR crypto)'
const url = `https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(q)}&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en`
return [{ json: { ...$json, url } }]
